artifacts.description: External sgRNA/reagent on-target or off-target quality. Must not be a static target-gene attribute or Jiang-only mixscale score.
artifacts.promotion_note: If acquired and CPU gate passes, possible future reagent-quality sampling/filtering smoke after external audit.

artifacts.description: External biological assay duration, recovery time, induction time, or perturbation maturity. Must vary within datasets and not be a dataset/source proxy.
artifacts.promotion_note: If acquired and CPU gate passes, possible timing-aware curriculum/filter smoke after external audit.

artifacts.description: External condition-level viability, depletion, fitness, growth, survival, or toxicity side assay. Must be independent of cell count/QC and not just target essentiality.
artifacts.promotion_note: If acquired and CPU gate passes, possible tail-protection route after external audit.
